title: August 26
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 26''' is the 238th day of the year (239th in leap years). There are 127 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Don LaFontaine]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Patrick Kennedy]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Nazneen Contractor]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 2|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 2]] published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Coruscant Nights II: Street of Shadows]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – [[Dark Times 14|''Dark Times'' 14]] published.
*2009 – [[Legacy (2006) 39|''Legacy'' (2006) 39]] published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Head to Head]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Lando 3|''Lando'' 3]] published.
*[[2020]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 3|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 3]] published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars Adventures: The Clone Wars – Battle Tales 4|''Star Wars Adventures: The Clone Wars – Battle Tales'' 4]] published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars: Kanan Modern Era Epic Collection: The Last Padawan]]'' published.
<noinclude>
